tasks.title: Setup Microservices Architecture on Kubernetes
tasks.description: Establish the foundational cloud infrastructure using Kubernetes on GCP US-Central region with MX-QRO failover as specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
1. Create Kubernetes clusters in both GCP US-Central and MX-QRO regions
2. Configure auto-scaling and load balancing between regions
3. Set up CI/CD pipelines for microservices deployment
4. Implement AES-256 encryption for all data at rest
5. Configure segregated database environments (Clinical, Analytics, Logs)
6. Establish network policies and security groups
7. Set up monitoring and alerting with Prometheus and Grafana
8. Implement disaster recovery procedures with automated failover

Technical specifications:
- Use Terraform for infrastructure as code
- Implement Istio for service mesh
- Configure Vault for secrets management
- Set up GitOps workflow with ArgoCD
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Perform load testing to ensure the infrastructure can handle projected 1 million users per month
2. Test failover scenarios between US-Central and MX-QRO regions
3. Conduct security penetration testing
4. Verify encryption implementation for all data stores
5. Test backup and restore procedures
6. Validate cluster auto-scaling under various load conditions

subtasks.title: Provision Kubernetes Clusters with Terraform
subtasks.description: Create Terraform modules for provisioning GKE clusters in US-Central and MX-QRO regions with proper networking, node pools, and security configurations.

subtasks.title: Implement Multi-region Load Balancing
subtasks.description: Configure global load balancing between US-Central and MX-QRO regions with automatic failover capabilities and latency-based routing.

subtasks.title: Setup Service Mesh with Istio
subtasks.description: Deploy and configure Istio service mesh for traffic management, security, and observability across the microservices architecture.

subtasks.title: Implement Secrets Management with Vault
subtasks.description: Deploy HashiCorp Vault for secrets management with proper authentication, authorization, and rotation policies across environments.

subtasks.title: Configure Segregated Database Environments
subtasks.description: Set up isolated database environments for Clinical, Analytics, and Logs data with appropriate access controls and encryption.

subtasks.title: Implement CI/CD with ArgoCD
subtasks.description: Establish GitOps-based CI/CD pipelines using ArgoCD for automated deployment of microservices across environments.

subtasks.title: Deploy Monitoring Stack
subtasks.description: Set up comprehensive monitoring and alerting using Prometheus, Grafana, and Alertmanager with appropriate dashboards and escalation policies.

subtasks.title: Implement Disaster Recovery Procedures
subtasks.description: Develop and implement automated disaster recovery procedures including backup strategies, restore testing, and regional failover mechanisms.

tasks.title: Develop GraphQL API Orchestration Layer
tasks.description: Create a GraphQL API layer to orchestrate communication between microservices and provide a unified interface for frontend applications.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for all resolvers and data loaders
2. Implement integration tests for API endpoints
3. Perform GraphQL query complexity analysis
4. Test authentication and authorization flows
5. Conduct performance testing with realistic query patterns
6. Validate error handling and response formats

subtasks.title: Design Comprehensive GraphQL Schema
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive GraphQL schema that models all system entities including users, medical records, providers, consultations, and prescriptions.

subtasks.title: Implement Entity Resolvers
subtasks.description: Develop resolvers for all entity types with proper error handling, field-level permissions, and integration with microservices.

subtasks.title: Create Optimized Data Loaders
subtasks.description: Implement data loaders with batching and caching capabilities to optimize database queries and prevent N+1 query problems.

subtasks.title: Implement Authentication and Authorization
subtasks.description: Develop middleware for authentication token validation and authorization checks at both operation and field levels.

subtasks.title: Set Up Rate Limiting and Caching
subtasks.description: Implement rate limiting based on user roles and operation complexity, and configure caching strategies for query results.

subtasks.title: Create Real-time Subscription Endpoints
subtasks.description: Develop GraphQL subscription endpoints for real-time updates such as consultation status changes and new messages.

tasks.title: Implement FHIR Gateway for Healthcare Interoperability
tasks.description: Develop a FHIR-compliant gateway to enable interoperability with EHRs, laboratories, pharmacies, and wearable devices as specified in the strategic objectives.

1. Validate FHIR resource conformance against official schemas
2. Test integration with sample EHR systems common in Mexico
3. Perform interoperability testing with lab and pharmacy systems
4. Validate data transformation accuracy between internal and FHIR models
5. Test bulk data operations with realistic datasets
6. Verify security controls and access restrictions

subtasks.title: Implement FHIR R4 Resource Models
subtasks.description: Create FHIR R4 compliant resource models for patients, observations, medications, diagnostic reports, and other key healthcare data types.

subtasks.title: Develop EHR System Adapters
subtasks.description: Create adapters for major EHR systems used in Mexico, implementing bidirectional data translation between proprietary formats and FHIR.

subtasks.title: Implement Laboratory Integration
subtasks.description: Develop integration with laboratory systems for ordering tests and receiving results using FHIR DiagnosticReport and Observation resources.

subtasks.title: Create Pharmacy Integration
subtasks.description: Build integration with pharmacy systems for e-prescriptions using FHIR MedicationRequest and MedicationDispense resources.

subtasks.title: Implement Wearable Device Integration
subtasks.description: Develop adapters for common wearable devices to capture health metrics using FHIR Device and Observation resources.

subtasks.title: Create FHIR Transaction Audit System
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all FHIR transactions with immutable records for regulatory compliance.

subtasks.title: Develop Bulk Data Operations
subtasks.description: Implement FHIR Bulk Data Access API for efficient population health management and analytics operations.

tasks.title: Develop Multimodal AI Consultation Engine
tasks.description: Create the core AI consultation engine that combines Spanish LLM, vision capabilities, and fine-tuned tabular models with 2M anonymized Mexican health records.
tasks.details:
1. Fine-tune a Spanish language medical LLM using Mexican health data
2. Integrate vision models for analyzing medical images and photos
3. Develop tabular models for structured clinical data analysis
4. Implement Bayesian reasoning with expert-reinforced decision trees
5. Create model ensemble architecture for diagnostic recommendations
6. Develop confidence scoring system for recommendations
7. Implement explainability mechanisms at B1 reading level

AI Architecture:
- Base LLM: Adapted from state-of-the-art Spanish language model
- Vision component: Fine-tuned medical image classification models
- Tabular component: Gradient boosting models for structured data
- Ensemble method: Weighted voting with uncertainty quantification
- Explainability: LIME and SHAP for feature importance visualization

Example inference pipeline:
```python
def generate_consultation_response(patient_input, images=None, medical_history=None):
    # Process text input through medical LLM
    text_features = medical_llm.extract_features(patient_input)
    
    # Process images if provided
    image_features = None
    if images:
        image_features = vision_model.analyze(images)
    
    # Process structured medical history
    history_features = None
    if medical_history:
        history_features = tabular_model.process(medical_history)
    
    # Combine features through ensemble
    diagnosis, confidence = ensemble_model.predict(
        text_features, image_features, history_features
    )
    
    # Generate explanation at appropriate reading level
    explanation = explainability_engine.generate(diagnosis, confidence, reading_level="B1")
    
    return {
        "diagnosis": diagnosis,
        "confidence": confidence,
        "explanation": explanation,
        "sources": get_relevant_sources(diagnosis)
    }
```
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Evaluate diagnostic accuracy against gold standard datasets
2. Measure diagnostic concordance with human physicians (target ≥93%)
3. Test with diverse patient demographics representative of Mexican population
4. Evaluate performance on indigenous language inputs
5. Assess explainability quality through user studies
6. Conduct bias and fairness audits across different demographic groups
7. Perform regular clinical validation with medical experts

tasks.title: Implement Security and Compliance Framework
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive security and compliance systems including granular consent management, immutable auditing, and certification-ready controls for COFEPRIS, ISO 27001, and INAI.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Conduct regular penetration testing as specified in PRD
2. Perform security code reviews
3. Test consent management workflows with various scenarios
4. Validate audit log immutability and completeness
5. Conduct privacy impact assessments
6. Test compliance with COFEPRIS, ISO 27001, and INAI requirements
7. Simulate security incidents and test response procedures
8. Verify data minimization and purpose limitation controls
